obligations.title: Packaging equipment configuration is documented
obligations.description: The configuration settings of packaging sealing equipment are documented prior to use to support traceability and reproducibility.

standards_anchors.context_note: Configuration documentation supports process control and traceability.

obligations.title: Packaging sealing process parameters are defined
obligations.description: Sealing process parameters for packaging equipment are defined and documented to support consistent package integrity.

standards_anchors.context_note: Defined sealing parameters support controlled packaging processes.

obligations.title: Packaging sealing process records are available
obligations.description: Records of packaging sealing process execution are available to support traceability and investigation when required.

standards_anchors.context_note: Process records support traceability and investigation of packaging integrity.
